query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, name, phone, type, monthlyFeeCents, isMonthlyMember, isRefereeAuthorized, role, active, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'Fundador', NULL, 'line', 0, false, false, 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()
FROM users WHERE email = 'costaberg12@gmail.com'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin', updatedAt = NOW();
